_comment: Market Mayhem (Crypto & Markets Daily) campaign import for YakYak — structure mirrors a real /workflow/export-campaign export. Config + 6-member cast roster ONLY (Max Mayhem the anchor + 5 personified assets: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Doge, The Fed, Gold); no rendered images/videos/audio (those generate per episode). Import: POST /workflow/import-campaign with body { userId, importData: <this file> }. Then copy the returned campaign id into marketing/MarketMayhem/show.env CAMPAIGN_ID. The style resolves by label ('Anime / Manga'); no style.id is set because style uuids are per-environment. The bold editorial-cartoon / financial-terminal art direction is in movies[0].style — that text is appended to every image prompt. Per-character accent colors are in cast.castSubtitles (subtitle font 'Orbitron' for the whole cast — a geometric futuristic sans that reads as a trading terminal). Unlike the single-narrator computed shows, each character gets a DISTINCT voice so the comedy lands (smug veteran vs chaos gremlin vs disapproving Fed vs boomer). animationType is 'kenburns' on purpose: Ken Burns is the cheaper, reliable interim look while Kling AI animation is still being worked on (the docs/alternative_setups.md #6 target is Kling for green/red candle 'battles'). The single movie is a season=null/episode=null TEMPLATE: copyCastFromSource clones this roster into each generated episode.
message: Hand-authored Market Mayhem cast/config template (no rendered assets)

campaigns.name: Market Mayhem — Crypto & Markets Daily
campaigns.prompt: A daily crypto/markets show: personified assets (Bitcoin, Ethereum, Doge, The Fed, Gold) react to the day's real price action, anchored by Max Mayhem. Eight scenes, dramatized from live prices and the Fear & Greed index.

style.label: Anime / Manga
style.description: Anime / manga aesthetic — bold linework, cel shading, expressive characters and dramatic lighting.

movies.title: Market Mayhem
movies.plot: Recurring cast template for the daily Market Mayhem markets show. Holds Max Mayhem (anchor, opens + closes every episode) plus the five personified assets; each episode clones this roster.
movies.style: Anime / manga meets financial-terminal HUD; a single personified market character front and center, bold clean linework and cel shading, expressive exaggerated emotion, speed-lines and dramatic anime lighting, glowing green and red candlestick charts, ticker tape and percentage glyphs in the background, high-contrast neon-on-dark palette. Green means up, red means down — that is the entire color language.

customCast.name: Max Mayhem
customCast.description: Max Mayhem: a manic late-night financial-news anchor, loud pinstripe blazer with the sleeves pushed up, wild caffeinated eyes, slicked hair coming loose, seated at a glowing desk of blinking red-and-green tickers and breaking-news lower-thirds, gesturing big, bold anime / manga style.

customCast.name: Bitcoin
customCast.description: Bitcoin: a smug gold-orange veteran character shaped around a glowing ₿ medallion, mirrored sunglasses, arms crossed, a been-here-before smirk, faint scars from past crashes, standing on a pile of older coins, warm orange rim light, bold anime / manga style.

customCast.name: Ethereum
customCast.description: Ethereum: an earnest, slightly anxious younger-sibling character built around a faceted iridescent blue-purple diamond Ξ, too many gadgets and gas-fee meters clipped on, mid-explanation with a raised finger, eager helpful expression, cool violet glow, bold anime / manga style.

customCast.name: Doge
customCast.description: Doge: a gleeful chaos-gremlin Shiba Inu memecoin, golden-yellow shiba fur, giant excited grin, tongue out, riding a rocket emoji, zero impulse control, comic-sans 'wow' energy crackling around it, bright yellow glow, bold anime / manga style.

customCast.name: The Fed
customCast.description: The Fed: a stern grey-suited disapproving-parent character, dollar-green necktie, half-moon reading glasses lowered to deliver a rate-hike glare, a giant interest-rate dial behind it, arms folded, marble-pillar backdrop, cold institutional lighting, bold anime / manga style.

customCast.name: Gold
customCast.description: Gold: a slow, sturdy boomer character shaped like a smug bar of bullion with a warm metallic sheen, tiny reading spectacles, 'back in my day' posture, leaning on a cane of solid gold, unbothered while everything around it flickers red and green, warm amber glow, bold anime / manga style.

cast.name: Max Mayhem
cast.description: Max Mayhem — manic financial-news anchor, opens & closes every episode.

cast.name: Bitcoin
cast.description: Bitcoin — smug gold-orange veteran, the ₿ that's seen it all.

cast.name: Ethereum
cast.description: Ethereum — earnest, over-explaining younger sibling, iridescent blue-purple.

cast.name: Doge
cast.description: Doge — chaos-gremlin Shiba Inu memecoin, golden-yellow, zero impulse control.

cast.name: The Fed
cast.description: The Fed — disapproving-parent rate-setter, dollar-green tie, cold glare.

cast.name: Gold
cast.description: Gold — boomer bar of bullion, 'back in my day', warm amber.
